title: Poland's controversial 'Highway to Hel' 666 bus revived
summary_full: Poland's seaside resort called Hel is getting its 666 bus service back, despite earlier opposition from Christian groups.
summary_public: Poland's seaside resort called Hel is getting its 666 bus service back, despite earlier opposition from Christian groups.
